title: Generalized terminal-op direct output
hypothesis: The accepted direct terminal-output mechanism should next be tested on a bounded first-pass family of terminal linear and terminal Relu outputs on the existing nm1 hardware, with measurement-only non-fused references recorded before any paired comparison work.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can a bounded mapper program for terminal linear and terminal Relu outputs establish clean nm1 reference points first, before direct-output generalization is attempted on those same points?
include: measurement-only non-fused nm1 reference points on a bounded terminal linear plus terminal Relu suite
paired direct-output vs non-fused nm1 comparison on the same suite after local legality and quality checks are in place
exclude: broad architecture sweeps before terminal-op legality and local gain are established
broad non-MLP model support claims beyond the chosen first-pass terminal linear plus terminal Relu family
follow_on_broad_sweep: run broader ranking or broader model-support evaluation only if the bounded generalized terminal-op comparison is positive or mixed enough to justify reintegration

expected_benefit: extends the accepted direct-output mechanism beyond a softmax-only rule
keeps the next proof focused on mapper legality and lowering quality instead of architecture ranking noise
uses measurement-only first-stage evaluation so reference points can be recorded without forcing a premature proposal judgment
risks: the chosen terminal linear plus terminal Relu family may still be too close to the existing softmax-tail proof
quality-gate requirements may grow if the generalized path touches numerically sensitive ops
a later broader model-support item may still be needed even if the first generalized mapper proof succeeds

expected_result.reason: the first item should only record non-fused nm1 reference metrics for the bounded terminal linear plus terminal Relu suite
if the generalized direct-output lowering is valid, it should improve at least part of the bounded terminal linear plus terminal Relu suite against the refreshed non-fused references
